features: MINT MADNESS: Elysium Spa Spearmint & Peppermint Bath Bombs, a blend of soothing, refreshing and invigorating fragrance. Each reselable pack contains 3 fragranced bath bombs

BUBBLE FREE : Prefer the perfect scented, silky water to relax into? Elysium Spa Bath bombs are the perfect addition to your bath, easy to use, just add water, add the bath bomb, which will gently and release it's fragrance. Relax and enjoy.

READY TO USE: Elysium Spa Bath Bombs, ready to use, open the package, add the bath bomb to warm running bath water for a wonderfully soothing and relaxing bath. Re-seal pack after each bath bomb is removed to keep remaining bath bombs in the pack dry
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Elysium Spa Spearmint & Peppermint Bath Bombs
description: Product Description READY TO USE: Elysium Spa Bath Bombs, ready to use, open the package, add the bath bomb to warm running bath water for a wonderfully soothing and relaxing bath. Re-seal pack after each bath bomb is removed to keep remaining bath bombs in the pack dry Directions Open the package, add the bath bomb to warm running bath water, re-seal pack after each use to keep remaining bath bombs dry. Safety Warning Use only in the bath. Keep remaining bath bombs dry. Avoid contact with eyes. Do not use if you have sensitive skin or are pregnant. Be cautious of slippery surfaces. See more
